title: NenPublication Canonical Schema
$comment: Last modified on 2026-03-06 by Hans Bot - NEN. Derived from 'NEN Content Publication V0.8.1-bundled.yaml'

nenPublicationURN.$comment: copied from 'cen-publications.yaml', ref hapi:docu:003. No internal reference, but defined in https://nendelft.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/Normenbank/pages/268009511/Value+lists#Naming-convention-NEN-urn%E2%80%99s (adding as optional attribute nevertheless)

nenPublicationType.$comment: Internal reference: https://nendelft.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/Normenbank/pages/174915663/nenPublicationType. Note that this differs from the haromized definition of publicationType: ./NenDefinitions.json#/definitions/publicationType

nenLanguage.description: Primary language of the NEN publication, represented as an ISO 639-1 code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'nl' for Dutch).
nenLanguage.$comment: Note: multiple languages can be concatenated (separated by semicolon) in one string. Internal reference: https://nendelft.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/Normenbank/pages/141656215/nenLanguage

projectId.$comment: can be used as path parameter in link definition in the API

nenContentRefId.$comment: can be used as path parameter in link definition in the API
